name: Runza
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the dough from the refrigerator and let it rise for 30-60 minutes at room temperature.
2. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Saute the onion in 1 tablespoon margarine until transparent.
4. Add cabbage and cook until soft.
5. Add beef, salt, and pepper, and cook until browned.
6. Roll out each loaf of dough to approximately 1 foot long and 8 inches wide.
7. Divide each loaf into 2 equal portions.
8. Divide the meat mixture into 4 equal portions, and fill each center of the dough with 1 portion of meat.
9. Fold the bottom and top edges of the dough into the center, seal and fold the outer edges.
10. Place the folded side down on a greased cookie sheet or baking tray.
11. Brush the tops with butter or margarine.
12. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20-25 minutes, until the bread is golden-brown.
13. Remove from the oven and serve immediately.
